seoTitle: Northdown vs Notley Hills — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Northdown and Notley Hills. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Northdown vs Notley Hills: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Northdown and Notley Hills.
heading: Northdown vs Notley Hills — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Northdown, Tasmania and Notley Hills, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Notley Hills has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Northdown (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Northdown or Notley Hills safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Northdown has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Notley Hills scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Northdown scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Notley Hills scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Northdown or Notley Hills?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Notley Hills has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
